creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Samy Mahmoudi from comment #0)

- Update to version 1.0.6
- Add LICENSE

This release fixes a bug in 64-bit builds which caused the maximum
request size to be incorrectly calculated.

Release announcement: https://lists.x.org/archives/xorg/2019-February/059612.html
